reasons: Kaja can isolate a priority target, giving Paquito a clean close-range burst window.
Paquito can follow Kaja's forced movement with fast damage and control before the target resets.

proof.summary: Kaja locks or drags one target, while Paquito follows with close-range burst and crowd control.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a squishy or high-value target.
Paquito is close enough to immediately follow the pull.
failureCases: Paquito has already spent key skills.
The target survives long enough for teammates to peel.

reasons: Franco can create a single-target pick window for Paquito with hook or suppression.
Paquito can quickly add burst while the caught target has limited room to dodge.

proof.summary: Franco catches one enemy, and Paquito converts the confirmed target into immediate close-range burst.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches a target near Paquito's position.
Paquito holds combo resources for the confirmed hook or suppression.
failureCases: Franco hooks a tank instead of a priority target.
Paquito is not ready to follow.
The enemy team counter-engages after the pick attempt.

reasons: Mathilda helps Paquito enter or exit after his combo.
Mathilda's shield gives Paquito more safety during aggressive trades.

proof.summary: Mathilda improves Paquito's access and safety, while Paquito converts the movement support into burst pressure.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda uses Guiding Wind for Paquito's real commit.
Paquito saves enough skills to benefit from the added mobility.
failureCases: Paquito dives before Mathilda can help.
Mathilda is forced to protect another teammate.
Enemy crowd control interrupts Paquito before he completes the combo.

reasons: Angela can attach to Paquito and add shield value while he dives.
Paquito gives Angela a clear aggressive host during skirmishes and pickoffs.

proof.summary: Angela gives Paquito additional survivability during dive windows, helping him stay longer in close-range fights.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Paquito's main commit.
Paquito uses the shield to finish a fight instead of chasing too deep.
failureCases: Enemy burst breaks the shield before Paquito completes his combo.

reasons: Rafaela's movement support helps Paquito chase or disengage after a combo.
Her healing helps Paquito keep fighting through short skirmishes.

proof.summary: Rafaela gives Paquito speed and sustain, improving his ability to enter, trade, and reset.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela stays close enough to support Paquito's skirmish path.
Paquito uses the speed boost to land combo pressure instead of overextending.
failureCases: Paquito dives outside Rafaela's support range.
Enemy hard crowd control stops Paquito despite the speed boost.
Rafaela is picked off before Paquito engages.
